blue-boar: Hit a most-muscular in the deli case and every hot dog in the county quietly resigned.
cosmic-yawn: Has watched galaxies born and die, remains unimpressed and faintly cold. The scarf is not helping.
red-rustler: Snapped into this timeline and drew on his own shadow. Fastest meat in the West, allegedly.
pick-boss: Unclogs your drain, then curls the drain. Bills you twice. Legally we can't confirm who he is.
ghost-chef: Died face-down in the bisque, '78. Still expediting. The gold grill was already paid off.
beast-hug: Two fools learn that leaning is cheaper than therapy. The crown was recovered from a ditch.
meltdown: Ninety-six years of smiling ended at 12:01 AM, January 1st. This is whatever's left.
bone-pop: Died dapper, stayed dapper. The little heart tattoo was a mistake from a livelier decade.
bone-bard: Death, but make it casual Friday. Hands in the jean pockets since '87. Not currently reaping.
mad-grin: The teeth are real; everything else is a rumor. Fires finger-guns at concepts that aren't there.
caped-hound: Old money, older laugh. Will hyuck at your funeral, then quietly inherit the estate. A-hyuck.
sly-chef: Steals the recipe, then improves it. Wanted in five kitchens for aggravated seasoning.
big-grin: Been this happy for eleven hours straight. Nobody knows why. The scarf knows and won't talk.
chef-fang: The tasting menu is you. Reservations required; survival is not. Compliments to the chef.
blade-prince: He'd murder you, but it's nearly bedtime and frankly he's not feeling it. The onesie has a belt for a reason.
streetwise: Has leaned on that invisible wall for eleven years, refusing to explain. The leather is real, probably.
drip-dog: Left him on the dashboard one hour. This came back. Do not pet — you will stick, and he does not let go.
neon-sage: The overalls are load-bearing. The hair is structural. The confidence is entirely, gloriously unearned.
fond-beast: They met in group therapy. The trident's decorative. The hug is not. No one knows what species is happening.
rainbow-maw: The dentist wept. The teeth are load-bearing. It hasn't stopped smiling since '97 and nobody dares ask why.
gold-sage: Attained inner peace and a 400-pound bench in one lifetime. Does not skip leg day. Does not skip wisdom.
cracked-heart: He wrote poems about it. The spear is a metaphor. The blood is not. She never did text him back.
solar-jester: Beneath the burning clown-sun, a small pink orb is having the best day of its life. It knows nothing. Bliss.
shadow-pair: Names withheld pending trial. The pink one did it. The blue one drove. Neither of them is talking.
blue-bones: Thirty years in demolition; no helmet was gonna help. Still clocks in. Still on his phone at 2 sharp.
red-wraith: The glowing red eyes are pure rage. Possibly also conjunctivitis. Woke up on the wrong side of the abyss.
twin-hounds: Pals since the printer jammed. The magenta isn't their fault. Say cheese. Prom, honestly, was magical.
alley-trio: The crown came from a dumpster. He wears it regardless. The dog is his knight. The kingdom is one alley.
fuzz-trio: They stood there for six hours. There was no bus. There was never going to be a bus.
fuzz-totem: Reached the summit by standing on his friends' shoulders. Literally. They did not consent.
blue-beak: Two shades, one cigarette, zero regrets. Came for the open bar, stayed for the chaos.
feather-mage: Turns lead into gold, allegedly. Mostly just turns the whole room into a kaleidoscope.
blue-phoenix: Found nirvana behind a Douglas fir. Would like to discuss it with you. At great length.
joy-blast: Whatever it was, it hit hard. Dosage hereby recommended to no one and to everyone.
pajama-bear: It is 4 AM. The bear is awake. The bear is replaying a thing he said back in 1987.
moon-rat: Nightly he reaches for the moon. Nightly he gets close. The moon has a restraining order.
noodle-arms: He's pointing at something deeply profound. He forgot what. He is pointing anyway.
guffaw: There was no joke. There is no joke. He has been like this since sometime Tuesday.
blue-gulp: The tongue came out and never went back in. He's fine with it. Everything is fine.
masked-hare: Found loitering near the carrots. He has an alibi. The alibi is also a rabbit.
red-hound: Still a good boy. Still does not know why the walls are breathing. Still a very good boy.
barn-rooster: Runs the henhouse, answers to no one. Peaked in high school and made it everyone's problem.
sly-imp: Sold three different men the same bridge before lunch. Kept the boots as commission.
ink-cat: Therapy was booked, so he settled it with himself in the mud. Both sides lost, both sides won.
neon-court: Crowned himself king, drafted the elephant, gave the neighbor kids wings. Detention now theological.
count-fuzz: Loves you fractally, in every reflection at once. Brought a ball, no pants. Never had pants.
moon-cat: Comes for your ninth life at dusk. Also knocks your soul off the table just to watch it fall.
purple-fang: Escaped the toy aisle in '98. The teeth are new. Nobody taught him the teeth.
three-minds: Achieved enlightenment thrice, forgot it thrice. The beard grew faster than the wisdom.
drool-ghost: Died at the rave, kept going. Still owes the DJ twenty bucks and one earthly tether.
coin-baron: Forty volumes on tadpole law, one pair of untied sneakers. Retains everything but where the pond went.
blaze-grin: The house is on fire, and so is he, and honestly? Best day of his life.
smoke-imp: Rubber-hose era, tar-filled lungs. That smoke ring's the only halo he'll ever get.
spun-grin: Eyes crossed out, thumbs fully up. Nobody has the heart to tell him the ride ended hours ago.
green-drifter: Been at the drum circle since Tuesday. Swears the pink sky is a government job. Might be right.
eruption: The prophecy promised fire and brimstone. It came in rainbow. The wizard is not taking questions.
mirror-twins: Both swore the other one started it. Neither could prove it. The checkerboard kept its counsel.
neon-crown: The crown descends upon whoever untangles the string first. It has been descending for nine years.
glow-pair: Perfectly balanced, perfectly annoyed. Each blames the reflection for the mood.
last-light: No fire. No heat. Just polygons. Still, they held their hands out, because that's what you do.
melt-waltz: He insists the tie-dye waved first. Toxicology declined to comment.
filament: Doctors advised against it. So did the beard. He did it anyway, and now he glows.
neon-garden: Somewhere in this bouquet, four friends are also partying. Nobody has found them since Tuesday.
riddle-cat: The cards pose a question. The cat poses. Neither is especially forthcoming.
unfinished: Left him half-drawn, coat billowing, gun loaded, waiting. That was three lunches ago.
card-sharp: He'll deal you a winning hand and vanish before you notice the grin stayed behind.
scarlet-mage: Nine hundred years of arcane study, one perfect chili. He considers it his finest work.
sugar-rooster: Crows every morning from a lake of jellybeans. The dentist has stopped returning his calls.
soaked-grin: Lives in a pineapple. Left it around 4 a.m. Regrets everything, including the pineapple.
kindled-rat: Woke up on fire. Still processing. The hair, at least, has fully committed to the bit.
ruby-idol: Assembled from every valentine you never sent. Handle with care; the heart floating above is load-bearing.
mad-king: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall accessorize. Chapter and verse, locked and floral.
third-eye: Opened the third eye. First thing it saw was the electric bill. The weeping is part of the package.
portal-sage: Ascended to godhood across three dimensions, still can't be bothered. The sword's mostly for the portrait.
lunar-fowl: Achieved total inner peace. Also achieving something out the tailpipe. Namaste, more or less.
fuzz-tower: Four generations of felt, one shared bad trip. The mustache claims to be in charge.
pink-nomad: Big red dog, bigger red eyes. Fetched the hookah, forgot the way home. Still a good boy.
cosmic-shrug: Top hat, no answers. The universe asked him a question and this shrug is the entire reply.
fractal-grin: Found inner peace and four hundred teeth. Meditate long enough and this is who's waiting.
coin-alchemist: Turned lead into Ethereum, Ethereum into vapor. The joint's the only thing here holding its value.
reach-wolf: Read that wolves are misunderstood. Now he won't stop reaching. Please hold very, very still.
tux-brain: Skipped the haircut, left the brain out, still got the date. Turns out it was the confidence.
sourpuss: Handed a brush and a party favor, produced neither art nor joy. The fun ends precisely here.
shade-rise: Blurry in every photo on purpose. You'd stay hidden too, looking this good among the pines.
bog-beast: Wrongfully convicted of loitering near a lily pad. Grips the chains, weeps into one enormous eye. Appeal pending.
sonder: The dawning horror that the Pink Panther, three cats and two sad frogs all have inner lives, and none of them like you.
citrus-haze: Doctor said get more citrus. Doctor did not specify a ceiling. There is no ceiling now, only oranges and regret.
rug-cowboy: Sells you a $4,000 Persian, tips the hat, vanishes into the sunset. The sequins do not come off in the wash.
white-robe: Welcomes you to an establishment that does not exist, staffed by a smug dog and a cat with unresolved opinions.
neon-motel: Contemplates the abyss beneath a flickering NO-TELL sign. The abyss contemplates back. Checkout is at eleven.
faded-frog: Swears the red eyes are 'just allergies.' The pink dog has heard this one before. The rug has absorbed everything.
pink-tango: Vegas, 1961, if the Rat Pack were two shades of pink and one very formal frog. Sammy would have wept with joy.
bow-frog: Learned exactly one magic trick. It is fire. It is always fire. The panther is nervous. The panther should be.
pink-tabby: Wears the beret ironically. Wears the frown sincerely. Has never been to France and has no plans to change that.
tux-frog: Runs the restaurant. Also runs everything else in this town. The bowtie is not a suggestion. Neither is table 22.
green-geezer: Retired. From what, he will not say. The tan is not a tan. The cigarette is medicinal, allegedly, mostly, no.
elder-ace: Owns a silk robe, three regrets, and a frog he refuses to explain. The black cat has stopped asking questions.
red-tropic: Old money, older habits, freshly painted. Holds the cigarette like a man who's never held a job. Snoopy disapproves.
vapor-wave: Weekend custody photo. The cat is not his. Neither is the saxophone solo playing somewhere in the mall.
red-bloom: Sweated through the shirt in Barstow. Says the bats are gaining. Tips exclusively in casino chips.
desert-robe: Two silhouettes, one shopping bag, zero regrets. The desert is also pink. Everything is fine.
bat-country: Wears shades indoors, tips in gold links. The plush dog is his attorney. Do not ask about the cat.
checker-frog: Bought at a gas station off I-40 for eleven dollars. Hangs above every motel toilet in Arizona.
red-hood: It's July. The elves unionized. He's weighing the naughty list against a fresh pack of menthols.
paisley: Charges $200 an hour to nod slowly. The cat is enlightened. The cigar is not a cigar.
scrapbook: Four generations, one lawyer, one whiskey, and a pink cat who's read more than all of them combined.
ink-sketch: Diagnosed with ennui and a low-grade Sunday. Prescribed pillows, silence, and absolutely no plans.
stray-loteria: Black cat, blunt object, and a dog who Told You So. Someone's luck just ran clean out of the pond.
purple-haze: A stop-motion holiday special, cancelled for the eyes. All the eyes. Do not watch this one alone.
pastel-ten: Rated ten out of ten by the moss. Hasn't moved since Tuesday. The cat considers this a personality.
fedora: Stared into the cosmos. The cosmos blinked first. Now he reclines and radiates deep disappointment.
red-eyes: Redder eyes than a Tuesday sunrise. Says he's fine. The eyes file a strong dissent. Nobody argues.
gold-chain: Turned the pond into wine, then into something stronger. The chain's blessed, the robe's rented, and Snoopy wasn't invited.
silver-fox: Sixty years of chain-smoking and one catastrophic avocado tan. Still knows when to hold 'em.
glitch: The transmission got weird around the third margarita. Adjust your tracking. Do not adjust the frog.
free: Bail got posted; the eyes never cooled down. Somewhere a Skynyrd riff plays for absolutely no one.
the-crowd: Somewhere in this crowd is the man who wronged him. He's narrowed it down to all of them.
velvet-lounge: Table for one? The frog doesn't take reservations. He takes souls. Two-drink minimum applies.
reefer: Wanted in three time zones over a boat incident. The hat isn't a disguise -- the hat is a lifestyle.
bow-cat: They put him in the bow tie for the photo. He has forgiven no one. He will not say cheese.
spawn: Every other weekend, alternating holidays. Twelve hearts left and one very good reason to keep them.
cloud-cat: He was mid-anecdote when gravity quit. The chair floated on. He just kept making the point.
rainbow-elder: Achieved inner peace, then a little extra. The fingertip situation remains under investigation by no one.
old-friends: Two legends share a laugh across the savanna. A child with a marker has improved the moment considerably.
swole-toad: Never skips a day, never posts without the vest. Ignoring seven texts to double-check his own arms.
kinchui: He'll make you an offer: the pond, a cigarette, a favor to be named later. Nod politely and don't blink.
small-counsel: Down forty grand at the tables, soaked through the aloha shirt, and the frog just shrugged.
candidate: Ran on a platform of flies and lower taxes. Carried every swamp precinct in a landslide.
purple-scarf: Blew into the disco on a cloud of smoke and cologne. Left with everyone's phone number.
greenback: Printed on the back of every bill in the swamp. Still not accepted at most banks.
plaid-elder: Eighty years of sun and cheap mescal. The dog and the toad are the only ones who still visit.
pipe-dream: Meditated twelve years to find inner peace. Found it. Still owes half the county money.
lotus-elder: Achieved total enlightenment in 1987 and has been quietly showing off about it ever since.
rain-rider: Rain or shine, the gala starts at nine. He'll be the one dripping on the good parquet.
free-throw: Scored two points back in '94 and has dined out on it ever since. The cat remains unimpressed.
red-fez: Through the crimson lenses the world looks warm and manageable. It is neither. But it looks it.
pastel-duo: The old man swore it'd be a short walk. The frog is beginning to have serious doubts.
gold-crooner: Two shows nightly at the desert lounge. Every ballad ends in a ribbit and nobody minds.
turquoise: Every stone is genuine, every pose rehearsed. Throws peace signs like they cost him extra.
space-pink: Never skipped leg day. Skipped the safety course entirely. The cat thinks he's overcompensating.
mug-shots: Booked, printed, and misspelled. Every one of them lawyered up before the second vowel.
glitter-grin: Trapped in the sparkliest bathroom fixture ever installed. He has made peace with it. He grins.
red-guard: Checking the list, checking it twice. The rifle's for anyone who lands on it once.
laughing-elder: Couldn't see the collection plate, but he sure could hear it fill. Praise be, and tip your croupier.
green-velvet: He noticed the beard blinking around Tuesday. By Friday it had opinions. He is coping.
nap-stack: Two hours in, the Pink Panther showed up on a disco ball. Nobody questioned it. That's just etiquette now.
pink-room: Day nine on the shag. He no longer distinguishes himself from the flooring. Rent has quietly stopped.
number-nine: Buried men in the desert. Tonight he's tucking in a frog. Don't mention it and neither will he.
cloud-collage: Doctor prescribed one support animal. He interpreted this generously. Two cats and a Pink Panther later, he feels centered.
mad-goggles: They said don't look directly at the enlightenment. He looked. Now he wears the goggles and mostly nods.
red-cackle: Held the room forty minutes, told exactly one joke. It was about a duck. He is still not over it.
orange-wrap: Doc said his eyes looked like basketballs. He rolled a cigarette, lit it, asked what the doc's looked like.
long-carry: Slow-motion walk, matching suits, zero explanation. The dog handles logistics. The frog handles cool.
number-five: Wore his lucky robe. Lost anyway. The frog behind him saw it all and said nothing, which made it worse.
rainbow-gate: Karl Lagerfroggeld takes payment in kandi bracelets only. Snoopy works the door, the Panther runs coat check.
pure-joy: The exact instant everyone got the joke at once. Cats included. Cause of death: joy.
blue-idol: Illuminated by monks who'd clearly seen some things. Patron saint of lost bets and 3 a.m. regrets.
parlor-scene: Bald, be-shaded, billing by the hour. The melting frog is the plaintiff. Nobody leaves this parlor sober.
banquet: The Hutt of the marsh receives tribute: three cats, one Snoopy, and a bearded novelist he doesn't recall inviting.
chrome-blank: Hall-of-fame frame, the engraver never showed. He's just relieved to be nominated for something.
bronze-think: Rodin's lesser bronze. Deep in thought about a bet he won't discuss. Note the bare, contemplative feet.
laser-stare: One finger-snap and the whole spectrum obeys. The frog on his lapel has seen the act and remains unmoved.
royal-purple: Regal, be-leoparded, and deeply unconvinced by whatever you just said. The glitter frame was non-negotiable.
orange-monk: Achieved enlightenment, kept the aviators. Dispenses wisdom in exactly one flavor: orange. The frog concurs.
night-elder: Somewhere past the third nebula the laughing starts and won't stop. Bring a cat. Bring the frog.
citrus-pool: Somewhere around Barstow the citrus took hold. Your amphibian correspondent regrets nothing and remembers less.
madiba: Rendered pixel by pixel in gold thread by someone with immense patience and even immenser reverence.
cactus-walk: Cool guys don't look at the heatstroke. Three amigos, one couch with no business here, zero explanations.
white-tux: Sinatra died so this could happen. The cat holds the rings, the grudge, and shades he refuses to remove.
red-sparkle: Achieved nirvana in a robe stitched from leftover Christmas foil. Namaste, allegedly.
the-touch: Everyone your uncle ever admired, airbrushed in flames on a 1987 Econoline. Prince and Snoopy, together at last.
black-tie: Six months of crochet, four skeins of yarn, one felony waiting to happen. He calls it cozy.
crimson-robe: The frog attends every gala and weeps through all of them. Open bar helps. Nothing else does.
low-rider: Hasn't stood since Tuesday. The cigarette is decorative now. The couch has legally adopted him.
peace-sign: Runs on hope, decomposition, and a two-finger promise. Polls shockingly well among the recently deceased.
big-laugh: Whatever he took is working. The rainbow comes from inside the man now. The teeth are a separate matter.
rogue-sheet: Quarterly board meeting of the estate. Motion to keep smoking indoors passes. The cat abstains, as always.
pink-prophet: Blessed the flock through a face shield as the pink rain fell. Divine, or a burst Pepto tanker. Faith untested.
soft-ghost: Legally distinct from any beloved rabbit you may recall. Airs only on 3am UHF and inside fever dreams.
blacklight-kid: Dropped out of Springfield Elementary to chase the mixtape. Ay caramba is a whole aesthetic now.
white-garden: Tape got eaten during the good part. The unicorn now buffers forever between two worlds and one tracking error.
the-scholar: Canonized for actually finishing the reading. The crozier is for shepherding, mostly for reaching high shelves.
green-fuzz: Day three off the wormwood. The frown is medicinal; the haze is just how Tuesdays look now.
disco-wire: One small step for a frog, one giant leap onto the dancefloor of the endless void.
drip-claus: Turns out the naughty list keeps a timeshare in the tropics. He regrets absolutely nothing.
silver-press: Nobody remembers inviting the cartoons. The disco balls, however, RSVP'd months ago.
number-six: Dealt a six, dressed like a royal flush. The frog in his shades sees all. The cat is unimpressed.
pixel-madiba: Rendered in sixty-four colors and still worth more than your entire cartridge collection.
white-turban: Attained inner peace, one orange tabby, and a beagle. Still cannot locate his keys.
court-cackle: Down thirty at the half, cackling like a drain. This, gentlemen, is what enlightenment looks like.
holo-blank: Graded gem mint. Depicts nothing whatsoever. Worth a fortune for reasons collectors refuse to discuss.
two-legends: One brought the guitar, one brought the grin, neither brought a permit for this jam session.
prism-prayer: He prayed for enlightenment. The prayer worked. The prayer, frankly, worked a little too well.
silver-stroll: Man, cat, and beagle, all arms raised, all convinced they won. The award was never specified.
gold-kid: You're a good man, Charlie Bullion. Also, at some point, you became entirely solid gold.
motllociater: Nobody knows what a Motllociater is. Two of them showed up anyway, glowing under the grid.
